Tests if `Object.prototype` is of type "object".

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion that checks the type of `Object.prototype` to ensure it is an "object". It serves as a basic validation to confirm that the JavaScript environment behaves as expected regarding the fundamental `Object` prototype. This is a narrow functionality script, primarily used for testing or verifying the consistency of the JavaScript runtime environment. The assertion will throw an error if the condition is not met, indicating a potential issue with the environment setup.
